name: SkyAI, Inc.
business: Sharps Technology, Inc. is a medical device sales and distribution enterprise focused on the marketing and distribution of syringe products and related drug-delivery systems. The company markets its products to hospitals, clinics, healthcare providers, and medical supply organizations in both domestic and international markets. It also holds a digital asset treasury primarily in Solana (SOL) as part of a treasury strategy adopted in August 2025.

exposures.sentence: Sharps Technology, Inc. is a medical device sales and distribution enterprise focused on the marketing and distribution of syringe products and related drug-delivery systems.
On August 23, 2025, we adopted a digital asset treasury strategy focused on accumulating Solana ( SOL ), the native digital asset of the Solana blockchain.

catalysts.sentence: On August 23, 2025, we adopted a digital asset treasury strategy focused on accumulating Solana ( SOL ), the native digital asset of the Solana blockchain.

On August 28, 2025, upon the closing of our Private Investment in Public Equity Offering ( PIPE ) of approximately $400 million, our Board has adopted a treasury policy (the Treasury Policy ), the material terms of which are set forth below, under which the principal holding in our treasury reserve on the balance sheet will be allocated to SOL.

catalysts.event: entered into consulting agreement with Sol Edge and strategic advisor agreement with Sol Markets
catalysts.sentence: On August 28, 2025, we entered into (i) a consulting agreement (the Agreement ) with Sol Edge Limited (the Consultant ) pursuant to which the Consultant provides consulting and related services with respect to our Treasury Policy and (ii) a strategic advisor agreement (the Strategic Advisor Agreement ) with Sol Markets, a Cayman Islands exempt company (the Strategic Advisor ) pursuant to which the Strategic Advisor provides strategic advice and guidance relating to our business, operations, growth initiatives and industry trends in the crypto technology sector.

catalysts.event: entered into Custodial Services Agreement with BitGo
catalysts.sentence: On August 19, 2025, our wholly-owned subsidiary, Sol Equity Limited, a Cayman Islands exempt company ( Sol Equity ) entered into a Custodial Services Agreement with BitGo (the BitGo Agreement ) to hold our digital assets.

catalysts.event: entered into Master Custody Services Agreement with Anchorage
catalysts.sentence: On August 21, 2025, Sol Equity entered into a Master Custody Services Agreement with Anchorage (the Anchorage Agreement ) to hold our digital assets.

catalysts.event: entered into Controlled Equity Offering Sales Agreement
catalysts.sentence: On September 2, 2025, we entered into a Controlled Equity Offering Sales Agreement (the Sales Agreement ) with each of Cantor Fitzgerald & Co. ( Cantor ) and Aegis Capital Corp. ( Aegis ) (each, an Agent and together, the Agents ), pursuant to which we, from time to time, at its option may offer and sell shares (the ATM Shares ) of its Common Stock, to or through Cantor, acting as principal and/or the sole designated sales agent having an aggregate sales price of up to $236,605,575 (the ATM Offering ).
On October 2, 2025, our Board approved a share repurchase program (the 2025 Repurchase Program ) providing for the repurchase of up to $100,000,000 of our outstanding shares of common stock.

catalysts.event: entered into settlement agreement to settle litigations and spinoff Hungarian subsidiary
catalysts.sentence: On October 6, 2025, we entered into a confidential settlement agreement and release (the Settlement Agreement ) with Barry Berler, Plastomold Industries Ltd ( Plastomold ), Plasto Design Solutions ( PDS ), Plasto Design Ltd. ( Plasto Design, and together with Plastomold and PDS as the Plasto ) and Plasto Technology Group LLC ( Plasto Technology ), whereby the Company, Mr. Berler, Plasto and Plasto Technology have agreed to unconditionally and irrevocably release and discharge each other and their respective representatives from and against any and all claims alleged in the Litigation (the Settlement ).

catalysts.event: entered into Open Market Share Repurchase Agreement with Cantor
catalysts.sentence: In connection with the 2025 Repurchase Program, on October 6, 2025, we entered into an Open Market Share Repurchase Agreement (the Repurchase Agreement ) with Cantor Fitzgerald & Co. (the Broker ) whereby the Broker has agreed to act as a non-exclusive agent on behalf of us to repurchase shares of Common Stock in the open market pursuant to Rule 10b-18 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934.

catalysts.event: Board approved updates to Treasury Policy authorizing formation of Treasury Oversight Committee
catalysts.sentence: Our Board of Directors (the Board ) approved updates to our Treasury Policy on December 20, 2025, authorizing the formation of the Treasury Oversight Committee.

catalysts.event: Board approved Amended and Restated Bylaws
catalysts.sentence: On January 15, 2026, the Board approved and adopted the Amended and Restated Bylaws of the Company (the Bylaws ) to update certain procedures and make various technical and conforming changes.
